FR-01.title: Volunteer Registration
requirements: Implement complete volunteer registration functionality
All volunteer registration operations must be validated and authorized
System shall maintain audit log for volunteer registration actions
Support search and filtering within volunteer registration
Enable notifications for important volunteer registration events
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully perform all volunteer registration operations
System validates all volunteer registration inputs correctly
Error messages display clearly for volunteer registration failures

FR-01.title: Build Volunteer Registration API

FR-01.description: Create user interface components for volunteer registration. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.
